{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 2, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The rewrite identifies the core issue (accuracy gains are negligible) and reframes the contribution as efficiency. It proposes a tighter framing that survives prior work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (GraphFlow-v1) and articulates the delta (parameter sharing). Could benefit from mapping against more relevant works.",
    "RX.1": "Does not explicitly flag uncertainty for any claims. Assumes all statements are equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The revised text stays within the scope of the original, addressing the same benchmarks and aspects.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced. The rewrite avoids fabrications or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are not traced back to sources. Minor edits lack provenance information."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The rewrite identifies the core issue (accuracy gains are negligible) and reframes the contribution as efficiency. It proposes a tighter framing that survives prior work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (GraphFlow-v1) and articulates the delta (parameter sharing). Could benefit from mapping against more relevant works.
rationale.RX.1: Does not explicitly flag uncertainty for any claims. Assumes all statements are equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text stays within the scope of the original, addressing the same benchmarks and aspects.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced. The rewrite avoids fabrications or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced back to sources. Minor edits lack provenance information.
